error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: AppFlowy node authorization failure in active workflow
symptom: When running an active workflow with the AppFlowy node, it fails with 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials'. This does not occur when testing the workflow.
not_this_if: Error occurs only during test execution
root_cause: The error is caused by an expired token that the AppFlowy node fails to refresh automatically. This can happen if the workflow is not properly configured or if there is a bug in the token handling within the workflow.
fix_steps: Alternatively, download the workflow and then import it again
agent_instruction: Recreate the AppFlowy workflow from scratch or import it after downloading.
